items.title: First round of US-Iran talks end with 'encouraging progress', mediators say
items.summary: The US-Iran talks began on Sunday in Switzerland, after last week's agreement, which includes a commitment to reach a final deal within 60 days.

items.title: Fuel sales halted in occupied Crimea as Ukraine targets oil facilities
items.summary: Fuel had already been rationed due to shortages caused by Kyiv's attacks against supply routes in Russian-occupied territories.

items.title: Ethiopia PM's party wins landslide as fears grow of new conflict
items.summary: Abiy Ahmed's party retains its huge majority despite unrest in several parts of Ethiopia and tensions with its neighbours.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil
Still haven't filed your taxes? Here's what you need to know
items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 不滿總統大選結果 哥倫比亞抗議者燒美國國旗、與防暴警察衝突
